summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Universal Scenario Data Hub. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features working correctly including stat cards, source filters, scenario detail view with TrajectoryViewer chart, Data Sources tab, and Sync History tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Scenario data fetchers use SYNTHETIC/GENERATED data rather than live API calls to NGFS/IPCC/IEA/IRENA - this is MOCKED by design for initial implementation
seed_data_creation: Data already seeded: 4 sources, 16 scenarios, 342 trajectories from sync-all operation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Hub feature fully tested and working. Backend uses PostgreSQL (Supabase). 4 Tier 1 sources: NGFS (6 scenarios, 240 traj), IPCC (5 scenarios, 20 traj), IEA (3 scenarios, 72 traj), IRENA (2 scenarios, 10 traj). All sync operations successful. TrajectoryViewer shows line charts with variable/region dropdowns. MOCKED: Scenario data fetchers generate synthetic data rather than fetching from actual NGFS/IPCC/IEA/IRENA APIs.
passed_tests: - GET /api/v1/data-hub/stats returns correct counts (4 sources, 16 scenarios, 342 trajectories)
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/sources returns 4 Tier 1 sources (NGFS, IPCC, IEA, IRENA)
- POST /api/v1/data-hub/sources/seed is idempotent (created=0 on second call)
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios returns paginated scenarios with source_name populated
- POST /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios/search with query body returns matching scenarios
- GET /api/v1/data-hub/scenarios/{id}/trajectories returns trajectory data with time_series
- Data Hub page at /data-hub loads correctly
- Stat cards show correct values (Sources: 4, Scenarios: 16, Trajectories: 342)
- Source filter badges present (IPCC, IEA, IRENA, NGFS) with correct counts
- NGFS filter badge filters scenarios correctly to show 6 NGFS scenarios
- Clicking scenario card shows detail view
- TrajectoryViewer shows line chart with data
- Variable dropdown opens and has options (Emissions|CO2|Energy, Installed Capacity|Solar PV, etc.)
- Back button returns to browse view
- Data Sources tab shows 4 source cards with Sync buttons
- Sync History tab shows recent sync logs with success status

mocked_apis_list: NGFS fetcher generates synthetic scenario data
